ops.title: Port synckit watch layer to hardened fsnotify (v0.9.0 + reposync flip + v0.10.0)

ops.description: Fix watchman FSEvents exhaustion — final direction after three user-decided rounds (delete→fix-watchman→revert on ignore_vcs discovery: watchman's default ignore_vcs prunes .git/.jj from any repo-root watch, 0/30 vs 30/30 empirical, killing watch-project coalescing). Phases: (1) synckit v0.9.0 — recursive fsnotify hardening (WalkDir addTree + 30s WatchList-diff sweep + Create fast-path) + serve.go restart-with-backoff supervision; (2) reposync flips backend literal to fsnotify + release + host rollout; (3) synckit v0.10.0 deletes watchman backend + WatchSpec.Backend. Measures 2–3: /etc/watchman.json idle_reap_age_seconds=86400 (user sudo, pending); core.fsmonitorHookVersion=2 (DONE, verified). Plan: ~/.cc-pool/accounts/acct-12/plans/users-yasyf-claude-plan-s-splendid-herd-wondrous-gem.md
